ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package (e.g., hicolors.vba.gz) */,
  "package_type" INTEGER /* Type of the package (e.g., plugin, colorscheme) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the package was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the package was last updated */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL to the repository where the package is hosted */,
  "license" TEXT /* License type of the package */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Number of stars or likes the package has received */,
  "forks" INTEGER /* Number of forks the package has received */,
  "issues" INTEGER /* Number of open issues for the package */,
  "pull_requests" INTEGER /* Number of open pull requests for the package */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or categories for the package */,
  "downloads_count" INTEGER /* Total number of downloads for the package */,
  "last_version" INTEGER /* ID of the latest version of the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_package_type FOREIGN KEY ("package_type") REFERENCES package_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package this version belongs to */,
  "script_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the script */,
  "vim_version" INTEGER /* Version number of Vim */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who released the version */,
  "changelog_url" TEXT /* URL to the changelog for the version */,
  "compatibility" TEXT /* List of Vim versions the package is compatible with */,
  "download_url" TEXT /* URL to download the version */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the version file in MB */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the version file for integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" INTEGER /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin, contributor) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* GitHub username for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release note */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the notes belong to */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Detailed release notes for the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the version */,
  "bug_fixes" TEXT /* List of bug fixes in the version */,
  "new_features" TEXT /* List of new features in the version */,
  "improvements" TEXT /* List of improvements in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_notes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version that was downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the version */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was downloaded */,
  "download_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the download was made */,
  "download_location" TEXT /* Location of the user who downloaded the version */,
  "download_device" TEXT /* Device used to download the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "help_files" (
  "help_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each help file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the help file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the help file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the help file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the help file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the help file (e.g., text, markdown) */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the help file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("help_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_help_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the package type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the version */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the version */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the user who accessed the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
